description: Wire the Ink app, CLI command registration, Slash Commands, pickers, input handling, and live transcript updates.

userStories.title: Register the CLI Session UI command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want the new session UI command to be discoverable from the pibo command line.
acceptanceCriteria: Register the agreed CLI Session UI command in src/cli.ts
Add command help output describing the reduced Web Chat-derived session UI
Update root CLI discovery text without removing existing pibo tui or pibo tui:routed commands
Command startup is separated from implementation details enough to test or smoke test
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on final command-name decision from PRD 01.

userStories.title: Implement interactive Ink app shell
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want a status bar, transcript viewport, and input line so I can operate a session from the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: App shell renders status bar, bounded transcript viewport, and input line
App shell can run against fake CliSessionSource data
Keyboard handling supports Enter for input and Esc for canceling picker/detail mode where applicable
Manual TTY smoke test instructions are documented
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on Ink renderer and CliSessionSource fake source.

userStories.title: Implement Slash Command parser and local commands
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want clear Slash Commands for help, status, clear, and exit behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Command parser distinguishes normal messages from leading slash commands
/help lists /help, /new, /session, /agent, /status, /clear, /exit, and /quit plus Web-only exclusions
/status shows redacted source/session/agent/model state where known
/clear clears local display state without deleting session data
/exit and /quit close the app cleanly
Unknown commands show a clear error and are not sent as normal messages
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement session picker and new-session flow
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to choose an existing session or start a new one from the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: /session opens a keyboard-selectable session flow using CliSessionSource data
/new creates a session through CliSessionSource and opens it
Picker supports cancellation and returns to the transcript
Empty session/room states show actionable messages
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 and PRD 04 session source work.

userStories.title: Implement agent picker
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to select an existing agent/profile from the terminal without editing agents.
acceptanceCriteria: /agent opens a keyboard-selectable existing profile list
Selecting an agent applies it through CliSessionSource according to supported source behavior
Empty or unsupported agent states show clear messages
No profile create/edit/delete UI is added
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on PRD 04 agent source work.

userStories.title: Wire normal message sending and live row refresh
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want normal text input to send messages and update the transcript as the agent responds.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Enter on non-command text sends the message to the selected session
Input is cleared after successful send
Live source updates refresh shared compact rows and the Ink transcript
Send failures display a bounded error message
Manual TTY smoke test verifies message send and live transcript update
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002, US-003, and PRD 04 live updates.
